subcodes.first_line: O thou who art firm in the Covenant! Thy letter from Dublin, like unto the sublime Paradise, was received [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابت بر پیمان نامه ات در دبلین چون بهشت برین وصول یافت مضمون
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for specific individuals; groups, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution
